research_notes: Found executive information on company overview page (https://www.sanda-japan.jp/会社概要/). President: 代表取締役社長 大村章. Also found 取締役 羽田一彰 mentioned in news articles (朝日新聞/マイベストプロ featured). Established 2011-12-07, located in Meguro, Tokyo. Business: SES, ISO certification consulting, MA tool sales and implementation, SIA services. Small Jimdo-based website.
